title: Why Inventing General Relativity Is the Final Test for AI - Adam Brown
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Adam Brown on whether inventing general relativity could serve as a final test for AI capabilities. The discussion frames fundamental physics discovery as a benchmark for evaluating the depth of AI reasoning and scientific understanding.
